raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1264 would phase out particularly harmful ultra-processed foods from school meals in California by 2032.",
    "State scientists will identify 'particularly harmful' ultra-processed foods based on scientific research linking them to various health issues.",
    "Scientific research has linked ultra-processed foods to serious health harms including cancer, cardiovascular disease, and type 2 diabetes.",
    "Consumption of ultra-processed foods has been confirmed to be linked to greater risks of being overweight or obese.",
    "Americans, particularly children, consume a significant portion of their daily calories from ultra-processed foods.",
    "Excessive consumption of ultra-processed foods is a leading driver of poor health outcomes and rising healthcare costs.",
    "Ultra-processed foods are engineered to trigger the brain's reward center, which can lead to food addiction.",
    "Poor nutrition in childhood, primarily due to processed foods high in added sugars, is a major factor contributing to lifelong chronic diseases.",
    "California's health system is increasingly strained due to rising costs associated with diabetes and obesity."
  ]
}
```
